SOCIETY AND CULTURT
character   with
polyglot origins_ tne Free Worlds League boasts many competing diversions all available tor price Pay-per-view holovid extravaganzas are common_ as are live tours by bands magicians and other  entertainers   from across the Inner Sphere_ The most profitable national pastime_ however; i5 gambling: The League home to the independent planet ot   Kyeinnisan; also known as  tne Gambler' $ World_ Eagle Nest; the Cave and Light City are the best known gam bling palaces_ each able t0 house the population of small city within their huge, rambling complexes of casinos hotels; audi- toriums ano ballrooms. Four-card Drax is the most popular game attracting high-stakes players from overy Inner Sphere and Periphery nation. The Federated Suns half of the Commonwealth tends t0 sneer Iittle at the League high-glitz, low-glamour establish ments_ Only the Gambler's World gets ay respect from the FedSuns; which boasts eighteen of the twenty-eight worlds on the of ficia Riviera-style circuit: From the Ammon Ocean Resorts on   New Syrtis Dorado Casino City to Sun Prairie" New Monaco, there no end of getaways for those who can afford them. The Federated Suns Is also home Three House Entertainment; the only agency of its kind with licenses for travel into and out of the Federated Commonwealth_ the Draconis Combine and the Capellan Confederation New Avalon Publishers, the Inner Sphere single largest book publisher; has its home office on the FedSuns capital with remote pub lishing and distribution centers in every nation_ In the Combine the NAP office loose affiliate of Luthien Press The Lyran Alliance has always maintained a impressive mass entertainment industry: Alliance producers are into every thing; from music and sensory discs holovid dramas Surprisingly, rather than offering escape from the usual grind politics and war fare the Alliance capitalizes on it. The barely fic- tionalized account of House Steiner' $ rise_ produced as The Steinhearts_ Is one of the longest-running series ever created by Tharkad Media Associates_ As popular as any fiction are the Auburn histories written Dy members of the famous Auburn family; court historians Tharkad for generations. Melissa Auburn'$ latest  publication; The Black Widow: In Memoriam, stayed on the interstellar top ten list for an incredible thirteen months Lyran production team also created tne   Immortal Warrior series_ holovid action adventure show in which the main character   shares half his screen time with incredible explosions, carries small tortune weapons, never runs out of ammunition and expends about eight Iives per episode The Capellan Confederation imports most of its high profile entertainment; rather than directly subsidizing what calls 'unproductive  labor Popular   imports include Immortal Warrior series (held Up as proof of natural Lyran aggression) and Three House Entertainment's theatrical and musical troupes Lately; the Chancellor has allowed Canopian pleasure circuses -traveling DropShips stuffed with casinos and other flashy entertainment into the Confederation, gesture to the Magistracy of Canopus and reward Capellan soldiers for their recent hardships_ The Confederation' largest entertain

Gitted wariors have proved themselves on Solaris; whlle others went down t0 ignoble defeat The Game World has given rise to MechWarrior lepends: Gray Noton; Justiln Xlang Amanda Hamilton and Kal Allard-Liao, just to name few: provides way for warriors and nations t0 chan- their aggressions while giving the viewing public popular diversion: Representatives from   each   Successor  State   and  some smaller nations maintain 'Mech stables and work with Solaris City to keep up the stadiums. "Mech-on- 'Mech bouts team events, invitationals, grudge matches, the annua toumament t0 choose the Champion of Solaris the variations are endless; Even some renegade Clan warriors appear in Solaris arenas, though by all reports the idea of combat as entertainment sick- ens most who consider themselves true Clan warriors:
ment event the Quarterly Mech Games held on New Hessen and Westerhand Similar to the bouts Solaris these games draw new talent t0 the Confederation; Combine citizens can vacation at low-key resorts on every planet: House Kurita has recently begun vidcasting the Kensai Kami martia competitions, allowing its citizens watch some of their best MechWarriors battling each other: In demonstra tion of Theodore Kurita freer policies regarding mass enter tainment, the Solaris Mech duels are finally being broadcast within Combine borders_ Despite its historically xenophobic ten dencies the Draconis Combine allows outsiders at few enter tainment events and vacation spots, The worlds of Nirasaki and Alria two Of the plush resorts frequently visited by Combine nobility, are part of the Riviera-style circuit for anyone able to obtain visitors permits_ Nirasaki also hosts the annual Hiyake solar yacht races_ the premier event that sport. The world of Dieron hosts yearly naked-blade tournament; which evolved trom the older Combine tradition of blood sport. This tourna ment for professionals ad by invitation only: The sponsors sell secondary vidcasting rignts tO other nations for high price_ EDUCATION ~In any society. education the most powerful tool of pro paganda From Further Sayings of Shiro Kurita_ Imperial Press; Luthien; date unknown In times of war; education is among the first areas to suf: fer. On many worlds, particularly those run by large agro com: bines _ even  secondary schooi considered luxury:  Other worlds while valuing education_ lack proper schools and com- petent teachers. Governments almost always acknowledge that these problems must be addressed but often fail to fix them:
